interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. I interviewed at Revolut

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I interviewed at Revolut
interviews.interviewSection: On made the first stage of the interview, didn't get to the next stage. This is for the new observerbily team that is been formed. About 4 stages in total
questions: Question about metics and traces Prometheus and Loki

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. I interviewed at Revolut (Warsaw, Masovia) in Oct 2025
interviews.interviewSection: Process included: recruiter screening (Java fundamentals + concurrency), live coding (load balancer / URL shortener with TDD), technical deep dive (Java internals, DB, distributed systems), system design, team fit. About 5 weeks total.
questions: Implement a thread-safe load balancer in Java with register and get methods
How would you handle concurrent requests in the load balancer?

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I interviewed at Revolut (Dubai)
interviews.interviewSection: Very polite interviewers, average questions about concurrency, databases, But if you answer not by manual of interviewer, your answers will be wrong, despite on your expertise. Lack of adequate feedback after technical sections
questions: Circuit breaker coding task, databases, K8s

interviews.title: Sr. Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: 4 stages: recruiter screen, live coding (TDD, load balancer), technical/system design, team fit.
questions: Design a URL shortener with TDD

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. I interviewed at Revolut (London, England) in Oct 2024
interviews.interviewSection: I interviewed at Revolut in April 2024 first, and then in October as well. The interview process is unnecessarily long. The recruiter asks technical questions without understanding your responses — just after buzz words. Then one or two rounds of core Java interviews — very in depth, lots of internal workings of Java concurrency and multithreading libraries. With 20 years of experience I still struggled because they expect textbook answers.
questions: Java concurrency internals: locks, synchronized, volatile, thread pools
How does HashMap work internally under concurrent access?

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I interviewed at Revolut in Nov 2024
interviews.interviewSection: The interview had 4 steps: 1. Recruiter call, where you will be asked standard tech questions. 2. Live coding. 3. System design 4. Team fit (it can be multiple teams). After each interview, you will hear from their recruitment department. It took more than a month because it was 1+ week wait for the next interview.
questions: Standard questions that were mentioned several times here about multi-threading in Java

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: Live coding round: implement a feature step by step with TDD. Kept being interrupted and pushed to next requirement before completing current one. Very poor experience.
questions: Implement a URL shortener using TDD step by step

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 4 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (Warsaw, Masovia) in Oct 2024

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 4 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut in Aug 2024
interviews.interviewSection: The interview process was very friendly. The HR team provided information on everything. Everything was very clear and there were no surprises. The process went smoothly.
questions: Design a thread-safe service registry
Questions about ACID, transaction isolation

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. The process took 1 week. I interviewed at Revolut (Vienna) in Aug 2024
interviews.interviewSection: The interview process at Revolut is highly professional, beginning with an HR interview to evaluate the candidate's alignment with the company's culture and values, followed by several rounds of technical questions and assessments that thoroughly test the candidate's skills, problem-solving abilities, and adaptability to complex challenges.
questions: There are some routine questions and some technical questions specific to the position

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: Multiple stages. Live coding was a load balancer. System design round was deep. Team fit round rejected without feedback.
questions: Implement load balancer with round-robin and weighted strategies
System design: design a payment notification service

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 2 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (London, England) in Oct 2024
interviews.interviewSection: I advise people not to waste their time. 5 stages of interview. Initial screen with internal recruiter was fine. Coding challenge was nice. I would say I did it almost all right with TDD and explaining my thoughts, fulfilled all their requirements — just core Java with 15+ years experience. The interviewer seemed unengaged. Got an email back to say they thought about it and decided no.
questions: Core Java TDD live coding challenge — implement a service with tests
Follow-up: add concurrency / thread-safety to the solution

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 2 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut in Jul 2024
interviews.interviewSection: The interview process at Revolut is thorough and consists of five rounds: 1. Technical HR interview 2. Live Coding interview 3. Technical Round 4. System Design Interview 5. Culture Fit (for team selection). I had the opportunity to participate in the first two rounds. The Technical HR interview was a concise 30-minute GMeet call focused on my background and experience. The Live Coding interview was a practical exercise to assess understanding of basic coding practices — I was given a task to implement with TDD.
questions: Implement a basic URL shortener service using TDD in Java
What are the SOLID principles?
What is the difference between concurrency and parallelism?

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. The process took 1 week. I interviewed at Revolut in Jun 2024
interviews.interviewSection: Total disgrace — interviewer didn't show up. Wrote emails everywhere. No one responded. Very unprofessional recruitment process. I applied to the same role again, this time they didn't even respond to my application.
questions: Available time for screening interview

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: Recruiter screening with Java/DB questions, then live coding (load balancer in Java with TDD), then system design and team fit rounds.
questions: Implement a load balancer service in Core Java
Explain transaction isolation levels in detail
What are DB indexes and when would you avoid them?

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 4 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (Vilnius) in May 2024
interviews.interviewSection: The technical interview started with some weird requirements. They said in an email to have laptop and wi-fi, but what if you have a desktop with RJ45? They suggested training at HackerRank to prepare, but HackerRank is algorithmic while their task was just implementation of a simple load balancer registry which should store no more than n instances. Pretty average stuff.
questions: Implement a load balancer registry that stores up to N server instances
Add thread safety to the registry
Implement random and round-robin selection strategies

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. I interviewed at Revolut in Feb 2024
interviews.interviewSection: I sat my live coding interview a week ago and still haven't been told if I passed or not. My experience during the first round interview was good — caught off guard by some technical questions but assume that is by design. Was then invited to a live coding interview with instructions on how to prepare and the expected coding environment. The live coding interview was OK. They put a large emphasis on TDD but also on speed of delivery.
questions: Live coding — implement a service using TDD
Focus on clean code, tests, and incremental delivery

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. I interviewed at Revolut
interviews.interviewSection: I had the interview with the HR and she was in a rush, asking questions very fast and difficult to understand. She probably doesn't catch the idea if you are talking about something because she only knows the exact answer and ignores similar ones. A lot of database related questions while they are not looking for a DBA.
questions: Too many theoretical questions related to database read and write
What are transaction isolation levels?
Explain ACID properties

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: Standard process: recruiter screen, live coding, technical deep-dive, system design, team fit. Feedback was poor.
questions: Design a distributed rate limiter
Java concurrency questions: volatile, synchronized, happens-before

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 2 months. I interviewed at Revolut in Mar 2023
interviews.interviewSection: Two technical rounds. First one with live coding and writing tests, second with little coding and technical discussion. Coding exercises related to multithreading. After technical rounds feedback was decent. Later I got 3 'team fit' interviews and got declined without any feedback.
questions: Multithreading, partitioning, sharding, transaction isolation levels, db indexes, generally stuff from Designing Data-Intensive Applications book

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: Live coding round — implement load balancer. Then system design and team fit. Overall long process.
questions: Implement a load balancer with register(), get() random and round-robin
ACID, CAP theorem, transaction isolation levels

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 2 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (Barcelona) in Aug 2022
interviews.interviewSection: Just some standard Coding Challenges mostly focusing on speed and slightly on correctness. If you work to prepare your coding speed you will find it easy. However, they do ask you about Multithreading so you need to have those concepts very clear beforehand.
questions: ACID properties, CAP theorem, Multithreading concepts, Sharding/Partitioning, DB indexes (pros and cons)

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: Recruiter screen with technical questions, then live coding (URL shortener TDD), then technical deep-dive, then system design, then team fit. Very long process with poor feedback.
questions: Implement URL shortener with TDD in Java
System design: design a notification service at scale
What are the differences between optimistic and pessimistic locking?

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 4 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut in Jun 2022
interviews.interviewSection: I was reached by a recruiter over LinkedIn and then first HR round was scheduled. HR had some questions written and asked them. Once I cleared it, 1st round of discussion was scheduled with 2 interviewers, in which they asked to write a Java problem and unit tests. I covered all scenarios and it went well. After that I kept following up with HR for 2 weeks with no feedback, and after 4 weeks got a rejection email with feedback that doesn't align with my interview. Seems they just want to waste your time.
questions: Write a Java solution for the given problem and write unit tests for it
What are the SOLID principles?

interviews.title: Senior Developer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. I interviewed at Revolut (Paris) in Nov 2021
interviews.interviewSection: Implementation of a load balancer. The person was arrogant and very stressed in a way that made me very uncomfortable from the beginning. They almost seemed forced to conduct the interview. I did TDD and it was OK for them but they didn't let me finish the optimization of the code even though time remained and we started 5 minutes late. They reproached me for having difficulty initializing a Set, which wasn't true — I just momentarily forgot. They asked why I used Set instead of List, I answered poorly. They reproached lack of use of design patterns. No final result on my code overall. (Originally in French)
questions: Implement a load balancer with TDD
Why did you use a Set instead of a List here?
How would you apply design patterns to this solution?

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. I interviewed at Revolut
interviews.interviewSection: Recruiter reached out via LinkedIn, setup a screening call which was fine. After this, first round was a live coding round. Interviewer gave a very simple problem to solve. Then asked me to write test cases. After it, he changed the requirement and asked me to modify the code and unit tests. Again he changed the requirement — I realised this is a typical TDD/Scrum kind of live coding where you keep refactoring as per requirements. Candidate is expected to ask questions, drive the solution, write clean code and tests.
questions: Implement a service step by step with evolving requirements (TDD style)
Write unit tests and refactor as requirements change

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 1 day. I interviewed at Revolut (London, England) in Feb 2021
interviews.interviewSection: Describing here my experience with the Live Coding Interview — first of their 6-step process. I was given a relatively simple service to implement. My approach was to gain all clarifications at the beginning. After completing the first requirement, the second requirement required quite a bit of refactor and introduced a new concept. Normally introducing a new concept requires design discussion, but the interviewer just kept pushing to the next step.
questions: Implement a service with simple business logic and incrementally evolving requirements
Write clean tests alongside each implementation step

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a staffing agency. The process took 3 months. I interviewed at Revolut (Berlin) in Dec 2020
interviews.interviewSection: 2 screening calls (second one technical). 3rd interview was a live coding interview where I was asked to implement a URL Shortener. The interviewer was not friendly and didn't ask any personal questions — was just rushing to implementation and technical discussions, which didn't make me feel like we were working together. Kind of disappointing.
questions: Given a string, write a program that will output the string after a fixed URL

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter.
interviews.interviewSection: Typical Revolut process: recruiter with tech questions, live coding, deep tech, system design. Long and slow.
questions: Implement account transfer service with thread safety
Describe CAP theorem and give examples

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: The process took 2 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut
interviews.interviewSection: I was interviewed on the senior backend developer role. It consists of these steps: 1) 1h - Call with HR where they suddenly start asking technical questions (CQRS, O(n), O(log n), etc.) 2) 1h - Live code assessment with 1-2 developers 3) 1h - Another deep tech talk with 1-2 devs, also practical task, but mostly questions 4) ~1h - Design tech talk, architecture 5) HR soft skills talk
questions: Live code assessment: 3 tasks in a row on the same project about load balancing, focusing on code writing speed — JUnits required
A lot of irrelevant questions: design patterns, DB questions, some are too theoretical and not applicable in real life
System design / architecture discussion

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 2 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (London, England) in Mar 2020
interviews.interviewSection: Had a take-home technical assessment. I was told I succeeded in the technical assessment with no further details. Moving to the second stage, I had an online interview and knew I failed. I asked for feedback — the answer was 'Yeah I'm working on it.' Since then NO feedback whatsoever. This is unacceptable and disrespectful for someone who works full-time and managed to spend a lot of time preparing the technical assessment.
questions: Take-home technical assessment (no details provided)
Online technical interview — no feedback given

interviews.title: Senior Software Developer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 2 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut in Dec 2019
interviews.interviewSection: 1. HR-screen - 30 min. About 8 general questions in CS on data structures, etc. 2. Pair programming session - 1h. Simple but revealing task with TDD in mind — create design of simple system as 1 class, TDD it with a dedicated test. 3. Technical interview & Systems design interview - 2h. I had good times with the recruiter and pair programming Senior Engineer, but not with the final interview with 4 Senior Engineers. Feedback was a bit hair-pulling — mentioned a couple of errors during live coding that were minor.
questions: General CS questions: data structures, time complexity
Pair programming: TDD — implement a simple system design as a single class
Technical / System design interview with 4 Senior Engineers

interviews.title: Senior Software Developer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied through a recruiter. The process took 3 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (Kraków) in Jul 2019
interviews.interviewSection: I got taken aback by the interview process at Revolut. The test task isn't too complicated but requires a lot of time. In my case I spent an entire week doing it after work and the full weekend. I sent it back to the recruiter who contacted me initially, but never got a reply. In 3 weeks I got a no-reply response containing basically no details about my gaps — just generic phrases that aren't clear enough to define a self-improvement plan. This is a deeply disrespectful attitude towards candidates.
questions: Take-home test task (extensive, multiple days of work)

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. The process took 2 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (London, England) in Sep 2018

interviews.title: Senior Software Engineer Interview
interviews.applicationSection: I applied online. The process took 3 weeks. I interviewed at Revolut (London, England) in Oct 2017
